name: Baigan Bharta
recipeIngredient: 2 to 3 serrano chiles, seeded and diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake the eggplant for 40 minutes at 425°F on a baking sheet.
2. Split the baked eggplant and scoop out the pulp, discarding the skin.
(Alternatively, you can roast the eggplant over charcoal for enhanced flavor.)
3. Heat ghee in a pan over medium heat. Add cumin seeds, serrano chiles, and asafetida.
4. Cook until the cumin seeds darken slightly.
5. Add the scooped-out eggplant, salt, and coriander to the pan. Stir occasionally for about 10 minutes.
6. When the mixture thickens, remove from heat.
7. Stir in the yogurt, cilantro, and garam masala. If the yogurt curdles, let the eggplant cool slightly first, then add the ingredients before briefly reheating.
